tsb.title: Charging System Software Update
tsb.description: Software glitch causing charging interruption on VF8 models

tsb.title: Battery Cell Balancing Issue
tsb.description: Uneven cell voltage causing slow charging
tsb.solution: Perform cell balancing procedure via diagnostic tool

tsb.title: High Voltage Battery Replacement Guidelines
tsb.description: Updated procedure for HV battery replacement - software update only
tsb.solution: DO NOT replace battery hardware. Update BMS firmware to version 3.0.1
tsb.note: This TSB supersedes previous hardware replacement procedures

repair_history.symptom: Charging not starting, red warning light

repair_history.repair: Updated BMS software and balanced cells

VF8-001.recall_reason: High voltage connector recall - potential fire risk
